senses.definition: a winter sport where teams of two or four athletes ride a sled down a narrow, twisting, ice-covered track
a game played on ice by two teams of six skaters who try to hit a hard rubber disc into the other team's goal, using long sticks

examples.x: I plan to enroll my son in the local hockey club.
My cousin plays hockey every weekend in the winter.

senses.definition: a type of skiing that involves performing tricks on a course with jumps and obstacles

examples.x: The slopestyle event features skiers and snowboarders navigating jumps and rails.
The slopestyle event at the Winter X Games always draws top athletes.
Competitors showcase their creativity on the slopestyle course.
He landed a perfect run in the slopestyle competition, earning high scores from the judges.
He excels in slopestyle competitions due to his aerial skills.

senses.definition: a winter sport where athletes slide headfirst down a track on a small sled, aiming for the fastest time

examples.x: The athlete practiced skeleton racing for years to master the sport.
She won a gold medal in skeleton at the Winter Olympics.

senses.definition: the activity or sport of moving over snow on skis

examples.x: He took up skiing as a hobby and now spends every weekend on the mountain.
Skiing is a popular winter sport in many mountainous regions around the world.
The family planned a weekend getaway to the mountains for some skiing and snowboarding.
She took up skiing as a teenager and has been passionate about the sport ever since.
The ski resort offers a variety of amenities and activities for guests, including skiing, snowboarding, and tubing.

senses.definition: a winter sport combining cross-country skiing with rifle shooting

examples.x: Skiing and shooting are biathlon disciplines.
His performance in the biathlon was remarkable.
The biathlon requires athletes to switch from intense physical exertion to precise marksmanship in a matter of seconds.

senses.definition: a winter game where players slide round flat stones across the ice in order to hit a certain mark

examples.x: The Olympic curling event drew crowds of spectators eager to cheer on their favorite teams as they battled for gold on the ice.

senses.definition: a team sport similar to ice hockey, played on ice with a ball instead of a puck

examples.x: They formed a team to play bandy this winter.
The players use sticks to hit the ball in bandy.
The local rink hosts bandy games every weekend.
He enjoys watching bandy tournaments on TV.

senses.definition: a form of curling adapted for athletes with physical disabilities who use wheelchairs to compete

examples.x: Wheelchair curling is an inclusive sport where athletes with physical disabilities compete.
He enjoys watching wheelchair curling during the Winter Paralympics.
Wheelchair curling follows similar rules to traditional curling but with adaptations for accessibility.
She joined a wheelchair curling team in her community.
He dreams of representing his country in wheelchair curling at the Paralympic Games.

senses.definition: a winter sport or activity in which the participant stands on a board and glides over snow, typically on a mountainside

examples.x: Snowboarding is a popular winter activity that attracts enthusiasts of all ages to the mountains.

senses.definition: a competitive snowboarding discipline adapted for athletes with physical disabilities

examples.x: He's a rising star in the world of para snowboard.
She's excited to compete in the upcoming para snowboard championship.
Para snowboard provides opportunities for athletes of all abilities.
The para snowboard community is supportive and welcoming.
She's a medalist in para snowboard events.

senses.definition: a snowboarding or skateboarding maneuver where the rider jumps and rotates in the air with their frontside facing forward

examples.x: Her frontside air impressed the judges with its height.
They practice frontside airs to improve their aerial skills.
She learned to initiate her frontside air with a strong carve.
He's working on adding more rotation to his frontside airs.
She celebrated her first frontside air with a victory shout.

senses.definition: the position where a skier or snowboarder leans their body weight forward to initiate turns or gain speed

examples.x: Maintain a forward lean to carve smoothly on the slopes.
Start with a slight forward lean when initiating a turn.
Adjust your forward lean to control your speed downhill.
She lost balance due to excessive forward lean.
Increase your forward lean to pick up more speed.

senses.definition: a maneuver where a snowboarder or skier shifts their weight onto the front of their board or skis to lift the rear off the ground

examples.x: He executed a smooth nose press down the rail.
She practiced her nose press technique on the beginner slope.
The snowboarder's nose press impressed the judges.
He lost balance during the nose press and fell.
He added a stylish grab to his nose press.

senses.definition: a snowboarding or skiing maneuver where the rider shifts their weight onto the toes of their boots to change direction

examples.x: He nailed the toeside turn down the slope.
She practiced her toeside turn technique on the beginner's hill.
The toeside turn helped him navigate the icy patch.
Beginners often struggle with mastering the toeside turn.
She leaned forward for a smooth toeside turn.

senses.definition: a maneuver where a snowboarder or skier slides along a rail or surface with the front end of their board or skis

examples.x: He executed a smooth nose slide down the rail.
His nose slide impressed the judges with its precision.
The terrain park is perfect for practicing nose slides.
She's mastering the art of balancing during a nose slide.
He fell while attempting a nose slide but quickly got back up to try again.
